text:
Winning gold is one thing, getting to celebrate with some brisket just sounds better.

I am currently writing this Friday morning. As of right now the United States of America has 103 total medals, which leads the world for the most medals at the 2024 Summer Olympics. Something that is funny, if you just took the athletes from Texas that have medaled, they have more than some other countries. Currently Texas athletes have 35 medals. That is more than South Korea, Italy, Germany, and Canada to name a few.

One of the many Texas athletes that have medaled is Valarie Allman. She now lives in Austin, Texas and became the first female Olympian to win two gold medals in any field event. She says after winning gold again, she has one thing she wants to celebrate with.

In what maybe the most Texas response to what do you do after winning a gold medal?Valerie can't wait to get back hometo Austin and get a pound of brisket at Terry Black's BBQ. For folks not in the Austin area that want to eat what a gold medal Olympian eats. Terry Blacks also has locations in Dallas, Lockhart, and Waco.

Nothing against Valerie's choice in meat, but taking a look at their menu. The dino rib appears to be a must order for me. That thing looks absolutely ridiculous and I can't wait to try one in the future.

title: Gold Medalist Can't Wait to Celebrate Olympics Win with Brisket
description: Winning gold is one thing, getting to celebrate with some brisket just sounds better.
